name: Called Shot
challenge: Before one shot, call your intended shape or landing zone. Pull it off to score.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Before one shot, call your intended shape or landing zone. Pull it off to score. Reward: +2.

name: Deadpan
challenge: No celebration allowed if you complete your mission. Break character and lose the bonus.
rulesText: Manual mission check. No celebration allowed if you complete your mission. Break character and lose the bonus. Reward: +1.

name: Finger Guns
challenge: After a made putt, celebrate like a complete dork.
rulesText: Manual mission check. After a made putt, celebrate like a complete dork. Reward: +1.

name: Commentary Mode
challenge: Another player narrates your next shot. If you succeed, both earn +1.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Another player narrates your next shot; if successful both players gain +1.

name: Walk-Off Energy
challenge: After your final putt, do not watch it. Start walking immediately. It still has to drop.
rulesText: Manual mission check. After your final putt, do not watch it. Start walking immediately. It still has to drop. Reward: +3.

name: Club Twirl Tax
challenge: After your best full swing of the hole, you must club twirl. If the group agrees it was worthy, score it.
rulesText: Manual mission check. After your best full swing of the hole, you must club twirl. If the group agrees it was worthy, score it. Reward: +1.

name: PGA Interview
challenge: After the hole, explain one shot as if you're in a post-round interview. Group votes if you committed to the bit.
rulesText: Manual mission check. After the hole, explain one shot as if you're in a post-round interview. Group votes if you committed to the bit. Reward: +1.

name: Villain Arc
challenge: For one shot, openly announce an absurdly aggressive intention. If you pull it off, score it.
rulesText: Manual mission check. For one shot, openly announce an absurdly aggressive intention. If you pull it off, score it. Reward: +2.

name: Caddie for a Moment
challenge: Let another player choose your club for one shot. If the result is acceptable and you still make bogey or better, score it.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Let another player choose your club for one shot. If the result is acceptable and you still make bogey or better, score it. Reward: +2.

name: Respect the Line
challenge: Before a putt, dramatically squat and read it like it contains the secrets of the universe. Then make it.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Before a putt, dramatically squat and read it like it contains the secrets of the universe. Then make it. Reward: +2.

name: Signature Move
challenge: Declare one shot your "signature shot" before hitting it. If the group agrees it looked pure, score it.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Declare one shot your "signature shot" before hitting it. If the group agrees it looked pure, score it. Reward: +1.

name: Broadcaster Voice
challenge: Call your own shot in a golf-commentator voice before hitting it. If successful, score it.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Call your own shot in a golf-commentator voice before hitting it. If successful, score it. Reward: +1.

name: Stone Face Par
challenge: Make par or better and react like it meant absolutely nothing.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Make par or better and react like it meant absolutely nothing. Reward: +2.

name: Cartoon Confidence
challenge: On one putt outside 8 feet, confidently say "that's in" before the stroke. If it drops, score it.
rulesText: Manual mission check. On one putt outside 8 feet, confidently say "that's in" before the stroke. If it drops, score it. Reward: +3.

name: Group Approval
challenge: Do one ridiculous but harmless celebration after completing your mission. If the group gives it a thumbs-up, score it.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Do one ridiculous but harmless celebration after completing your mission. If the group gives it a thumbs-up, score it. Reward: +1.
